1. 	Electric charge is transferred to an irregular metallic disk as shown in figure. If σ_1,σ_2,σ_3 and σ_4 are charge densities at given points then, choose the correct answer from the opions given below:
(A) σ_1>σ_3;σ_2=σ_4
(B) σ_1>σ_2,σ_3>σ_4
(C) σ_1>σ_3>σ_2=σ_4
(D) σ_1<σ_3<σ_2=σ_4
(E) σ_1=σ_2=σ_3=σ_4
 
	[April 8, 2025 (II)]
	(A) A, B and C Only
(B) A and C only
(C) D and E only
(D) B and C only

0	string	text/plain	
1. 	Electric charge is transferred to an irregular metallic disk as shown in figure. If σ_1,σ_2,σ_3 and σ_4 are charge densities at given points then, choose the correct answer from the opions given below:
(A) σ_1>σ_3;σ_2=σ_4
(B) σ_1>σ_2,σ_3>σ_4
(C) σ_1>σ_3>σ_2=σ_4
(D) σ_1<σ_3<σ_2=σ_4
(E) σ_1=σ_2=σ_3=σ_4
 
	[April 8, 2025 (II)]
	(A) A, B and C Only
(B) A and C only
(C) D and E only
(D) B and C only
